data.narrative:
Ambient.ai is a Series B AI & Software company that has raised $146M to date. Valuation analysis incorporates a peer set of five same-stage private companies in the AI & Software sector, ranging from $500M (Photoroom) to $32.0B (Safe Superintelligence), alongside one public comparable (Palantir Technologies, ticker PLTR). The wide dispersion in peer valuations reflects the heterogeneity of Series B AI funding environments.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-Progression analysis, using total raised as a valuation proxy, applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, yielding $277M. Peer-Median analysis across the five same-sector comparables produces a median valuation of $5.0B, with a range spanning $500M to $32.0B. The peer-median method reflects market pricing for AI software companies at this stage but carries elevated dispersion risk given the heterogeneity of business models and capital intensity within the cohort.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $236M (low) to $5.8B (high), with a median of $2.6B. The wide range reflects meaningful uncertainty around whether Ambient.ai's profile aligns with lower-capitalized software peers or higher-valuation frontier AI companies. Key uncertainties include revenue traction relative to peer benchmarks, burn rate sustainability, and market differentiation within a crowded Series B AI landscape.
